title: ecbolium umbrosum
intro: Ecbolium umbrosum, also known as the white thymbre or dwarf hyssop, is a flowering plant native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
